title: Aptitude: Letter and Symbol Series - Q3

content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

Which of the following is second to the left of the twelfth from the right end if all the symbols are dropped? 

(a) F 
(b) C
(c) 7 
(d) M 
(e) None of these

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

b
Explanation:-
Given series – B @ C 7 N R % 5 $ G 6 K M & 4 S # P U 5 
After dropping symbols – B C 7 N R 5 G 6 K M 4 S P U 5
So, 12th from the right end – N
Hence, second to the left of N is C.
